selectedOwner: control and automation metric plans plus review and retirement triggers
decision: Reject activity as effectiveness. Retention requires accepted outcomes plus separate false-positive, feedback-latency, synchronous-human-attention, worker-duration, carrying-cost, review, and retirement evidence.
evidenceRequired: Every control and automation record includes the five required metric dimensions.
Each record names carrying cost, review trigger, and retirement condition.
limitations: HGI-306 defines measurement plans but does not fabricate historical outcome or cost data.
nonClaims: Run, command, or finding volume is not value, convergence, or safe continuous maintenance.
rollbackRevocation: Retire or foreground the loop if accepted outcomes do not justify its carrying cost or human attention.
